chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1746 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on CMA No.7523/2023 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 26-09-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Shar, learned counsel for the Petitioner and submits that he has been instructed by the latter not to press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
